narrative:
Mentor City has 35,117 registered voters, with 55.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.8%, a modest Republican lean of 3.2 percentage points.
